title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud infrastructure by exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, potentially leading to data encryption, service disruption, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and monitor CI/CD pipelines for unauthorized changes or suspicious activity.
Regularly back up critical data and ensure backups are stored offline or in secure, immutable environments.
Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to identify and mitigate ransomware activities early.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: HCL DFXServer is affected by an Authentication Bypass vulnerability via server response...
description: HCL DFXServer is affected by an Authentication Bypass vulnerability via server response manipulation. An unauthorized user without valid credentials can exploit this flaw by intercepting and altering the server's authentication responses, allowing them to gain unauthorized access to the application without verification.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The Authentication Bypass vulnerability in HCL DFXServer allows unauthorized users to gain access to sensitive systems and data by manipulating server authentication responses. This could lead to data breaches, unauthorized system control, and potential exploitation of other vulnerabilities within the application.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply any available patches or updates provided by HCL to address CVE-2026-35149.
Implement network monitoring and intrusion detection systems to identify and block suspicious activities related to authentication bypass attempts.
Conduct a security review of access controls and server configurations to ensure proper authentication mechanisms are in place and cannot be easily manipulated.

title: HCL DFXServer is affected by a Missing Access Control vulnerability. This vulnerability states...
description: HCL DFXServer is affected by a Missing Access Control vulnerability. This vulnerability states that certain endpoints are accessible without any form of authentication in another browser. This allows any network user to invoke these APIs and interact with the application without verification of their identity or authorization level.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-35148.

title: HCL DFXServer is affected by a Broken Authentication vulnerability via direct API access. The...
description: HCL DFXServer is affected by a Broken Authentication vulnerability via direct API access. The application fails to verify the user's authentication status when accessing specific API endpoints, allowing an unauthenticated attacker to interact with the APIs and perform unauthorized actions without valid credentials.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-35147.

title: An unauthenticated remote attacker is able to perform remote code execution due to incorrectly...
description: An unauthenticated remote attacker is able to perform remote code execution due to incorrectly sanitized user input in the SetParameter command.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2023-49900.

title: HCL DFXServer is affected by an Unencrypted Communication vulnerability. The application permits...
description: HCL DFXServer is affected by an Unencrypted Communication vulnerability. The application permits users to establish connections over unencrypted channels via the HTTP protocol, which could allow a remote attacker to intercept network traffic and expose sensitive data transmitted between the user and the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-35146.

title: An unauthenticated remote attacker can execute any command on the affected device due to not...
description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can execute any command on the affected device due to not correctly verifying the origin of a communication channel.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2023-49899.

title: Authentication bypass by primary weakness vulnerability in Spring Security Spring Authorization...
description:
Authentication bypass by primary weakness vulnerability in Spring Security Spring Authorization Server.

This issue affects Spring Authorization Server: from 7.0.0 through 7.0.4, from 1.5.0 through 1.5.6, from 1.4.0 through 1.4.9, from 1.3.0 through 1.3.10.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows attackers to bypass authentication mechanisms in the Spring Authorization Server, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive systems and data. Exploitation could result in data breaches, privilege escalation, and compromise of critical systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update to a patched version of Spring Authorization Server that addresses CVE-2026-22752. Verify the version is beyond 7.0.4, 1.5.6, 1.4.9, or 1.3.10.
Conduct a thorough review of authentication and authorization configurations to ensure no unauthorized access has occurred.
Implement additional monitoring and logging mechanisms to detect any suspicious activity related to authentication bypass attempts.

title: The Breakdance plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'fields'...
description: The Breakdance plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'fields' parameter in versions up to, and including, 2.7.1 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts into WordPress pages, leading to potential data theft, session hijacking, or defacement of websites. This could compromise user trust and expose sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Update the Breakdance plugin to the latest patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block malicious payloads targeting the 'fields' parameter.
Conduct a security review of your WordPress installation, including plugins, to identify and mitigate similar vulnerabilities.

title: The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an unauthenticated SQL injection.
description: The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an unauthenticated SQL injection.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-58078.

title: The WPBot – AI ChatBot for Live Support, Lead Generation, AI Services plugin for WordPress is...
description: The WPBot – AI ChatBot for Live Support, Lead Generation, AI Services plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 8.5.6. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to trigger arbitrary re-embedding of stored RAG documents, modifying the rag_documents table and consuming the site owner's paid third-pa

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15610.

title:
A local privilege escalation vulnerability in ESET Inspect Connector. 
The vulnerability was...
description:
A local privilege escalation vulnerability in ESET Inspect Connector. 
The vulnerability was caused by improper authentication in an IPC channel.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in ESET Inspect Connector allows local attackers to escalate privileges due to improper authentication in an IPC channel. This could enable unauthorized access to sensitive systems, potentially leading to data breaches, system compromise, or further exploitation.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update provided by ESET to address CVE-2026-6423 immediately.
Restrict local access to systems running ESET Inspect Connector to trusted personnel only.
Monitor system logs for unusual activity that may indicate exploitation attempts and review access control policies.

title: Use-after-free vulnerability in ESET Linux products potentially allowed an attacker to trigger...
description: Use-after-free vulnerability in ESET Linux products potentially allowed an attacker to trigger kernel panic on the system

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The use-after-free vulnerability in ESET Linux products could allow attackers to exploit memory corruption, potentially leading to a kernel panic, resulting in system crashes and denial of service.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches or updates provided by ESET to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a thorough review of systems running ESET Linux products to identify and isolate vulnerable instances.
Implement monitoring and logging to detect any unusual behavior that could indicate exploitation attempts.

title: The WP Bulk Delete plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the ...
description: The WP Bulk Delete plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'delete_user_roles' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.4.2 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15727.

title: The WP TripAdvisor Review Slider plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via...
description: The WP TripAdvisor Review Slider plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'filtersource' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 14.6 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information f

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15651.

title: The WPBot – AI ChatBot for Live Support, Lead Generation, AI Services plugin for WordPress is...
description: The WPBot – AI ChatBot for Live Support, Lead Generation, AI Services plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 8.5.6. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to delete arbitrary chat session records from the wpbot_user and wpbot_conversation tables, including chat history and conversation logs, by supplying a crafted userid value.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to delete chat session records, including user chat history and conversation logs. This could lead to data loss, hinder customer support operations, and potentially expose organizations to compliance risks if chat data is required for auditing or legal purposes.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the WPBot plugin to a patched version once available or disable the plugin temporarily if it is not critical to operations.
Restrict access to the WordPress admin panel and implement a web application firewall (WAF) to monitor and block unauthorized requests targeting the vulnerability.
Regularly back up chat session data and conversation logs to ensure recoverability in case of data loss.

title: The The Cache Purger plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions...
description: The The Cache Purger plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 2.3.20. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to permanently truncate the plugin's cache-purge audit log (wp-content/purge.log), destroying the entire cache-purge audit history. The tcp_log_purge nonce is rendered in the admin bar

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15350.

title: The SysBasics Customize My Account for WooCommerce – Live My Account Customizer plugin for...
description: The SysBasics Customize My Account for WooCommerce – Live My Account Customizer plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'row_type' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.4.14 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with shop manager-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15324.

title: The Tutor LMS – eLearning and online course solution plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to...
description: The Tutor LMS – eLearning and online course solution plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via Stored Quiz Answer Array in all versions up to, and including, 4.0.0 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with custom-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive inf

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers with custom-level access or higher to exploit SQL Injection, potentially exposing sensitive information such as user data, course details, and other database contents. This could lead to data breaches, unauthorized access, or database corruption.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses using WordPress
recommended_actions: Update the Tutor LMS plugin to the latest patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Implement web application firewall (WAF) rules to detect and block SQL Injection attempts.
Restrict user roles and permissions to minimize exposure to authenticated attackers.

title: The Quiz Master Next plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via stored quiz page...
description: The Quiz Master Next plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via stored quiz page data in versions up to, and including, 11.2.0. This is due to insufficient escaping on the user-supplied 'pages' parameter persisted by the qsm_ajax_save_pages() AJAX handler (sanitize_text_field only) and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query built in qsm_options_questions_tab_content() at line 143, where the stored page IDs are interpolated into an IN() clause via implode() with no

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13767.

title: The Themify Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up...
description: The Themify Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 7.7.7. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to overwrite or delete the generated CSS stylesheet file of arbitrary posts, including private and draft posts owned by other users, and modify plugin-scoped font options. The required CS

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Themify Builder plugin allows authenticated attackers with low-level access (e.g., subscribers) to bypass authorization checks. This can lead to unauthorized modifications of CSS stylesheets, including those of private and draft posts, and changes to plugin-specific font settings. Such actions could disrupt website appearance, compromise branding, or introduce malicious styles.
recommended_actions: Update the Themify Builder plugin to the latest patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Restrict user roles and permissions to the minimum required for functionality, especially for subscriber-level accounts.
Monitor website files and configurations for unauthorized changes, particularly CSS stylesheets and font settings.

title: CVE-2026-47828 - During bosh create-env and bosh delete-env, the CLI uploads compiled CPI packages and rendered job t
description:
During bosh create-env and bosh delete-env, the CLI uploads compiled CPI packages and rendered job templates to the new VM's DAV blobstore over HTTPS without verifying the server certificate, even though a CA certificate for that endpoint is available in the installation manifest. A network attacker can terminate the TLS connection, harvest the Basic-auth credentials, and read the rendered-templates archive containing every bootstrap secret for the new BOSH Director, then replay the credentials against the real VM's agent for root code execution.
Affected versions: bosh-cli versions prior to v7.10.4.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-47828.

title: CVE-2026-47826 - The blobs.yml path key traversal vulnerability in the BOSH CLI tool allows an attacker to write arbi
description:
The blobs.yml path key traversal vulnerability in the BOSH CLI tool allows an attacker to write arbitrary files and exfiltrate sensitive information.
Affected versions: BOSH CLI tool versions prior to v7.10.4.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-47826.

title: CVE-2026-12517 - The Fediverse Embeds WordPress plugin before 1.5.8 does not validate the destination of the server-s
description: The Fediverse Embeds WordPress plugin before 1.5.8 does not validate the destination of the server-side request performed by an unauthenticated site-info endpoint before fetching it, allowing anonymous users (the gating nonce is exposed on public pages carrying an embed) to make the site request internal and private-network URLs and read back the parsed page metadata. This is a Server-Side Request Forgery.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to exploit a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) flaw, potentially enabling them to access internal and private network resources, exfiltrate sensitive metadata, or use the server as a pivot point for further attacks.
recommended_actions: Update the Fediverse Embeds WordPress plugin to version 1.5.8 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement network-level restrictions to limit server access to internal and private network resources.
Monitor server logs for unusual or unauthorized requests to internal or private URLs to detect potential exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2026-12516 - The Fediverse Embeds WordPress plugin before 1.5.8 does not validate the destination of the server-s
description: The Fediverse Embeds WordPress plugin before 1.5.8 does not validate the destination of the server-side request performed by an unauthenticated media-proxying endpoint, allowing anonymous users to make the site fetch arbitrary URLs, including internal and private-network addresses, and read back the response body. This results in a full-read Server-Side Request Forgery and open proxy.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12516.

title: CVE-2026-12270 - The Everest Forms  WordPress plugin before 3.5.0 does not correctly restrict access to several REST
description: The Everest Forms  WordPress plugin before 3.5.0 does not correctly restrict access to several REST API endpoints belonging to its onboarding assistant: the capability check is only applied when an attacker-controllable request header holds a specific value, so it can be bypassed by omitting or changing that header. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to read onboarding status information, modify the related Everest Forms  WordPress plugin before 3.5.0 options, and trigger an email from the site to an arbitrary address.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12270.

title: CVE-2026-11875 - The WP Support Plus Responsive Ticket System WordPress plugin through 9.1.2 does not sign or verify
description: The WP Support Plus Responsive Ticket System WordPress plugin through 9.1.2 does not sign or verify its guest-session cookie, allowing unauthenticated attackers to forge it and impersonate any ticket owner (identified by email address) to read, reply to, and close that person's support tickets.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11875.

title: CVE-2026-11869 - The WP DSGVO Tools (GDPR) WordPress plugin before 3.1.40 does not perform an authorization check on
description: The WP DSGVO Tools (GDPR) WordPress plugin before 3.1.40 does not perform an authorization check on the immediate-processing path of its data subject access request feature, allowing unauthenticated attackers to generate and download the full personal-data export (including name, postal address, phone number, email, and comment content) of any user, customer, or commenter by supplying their email address.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11869.

title: CVE-2026-11571 - The Everest Forms  WordPress plugin before 3.5.0 does not reliably delete temporary CSV files genera
description: The Everest Forms  WordPress plugin before 3.5.0 does not reliably delete temporary CSV files generated during email-notification processing and leaves them publicly accessible in the uploads directory, allowing unauthenticated attackers to retrieve other users' form submission records via predictable, enumerable filenames.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11571.

title: CVE-2026-5523 - The Divi Form Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to,
description: The Divi Form Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to, and including, 5.1.8. This is due to the update_user() function accepting a user ID parameter from form submissions without verifying that the authenticated user has permission to edit that specific user account, and the handle_register_submission() function only checking if any user is logged in rather than validating permissions for the target user. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to change the email address and password of any user account, including administrators, resulting in complete account takeover.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5523.

title: CVE-2026-41857 - A compromised or malicious BOSH Director can execute arbitrary shell commands on the operator's work
description:
A compromised or malicious BOSH Director can execute arbitrary shell commands on the operator's workstation when the operator runs bosh ssh (or bosh scp/bosh logs -f) with default flags.
Affected versions: BOSH CLI versions prior to 7.10.5.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41857.

title: CVE-2026-15138 - A security vulnerability has been detected in tumf mcp-text-editor up to 1.0.2. This issue affects t
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in tumf mcp-text-editor up to 1.0.2. This issue affects the function _validate_file_path of the file mcp_text_editor/text_editor.py. Such manipulation of the argument file_path leads to path traversal. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. The vendor closed the GitHub issue for this vulnerability without any explanation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15138.

title: CVE-2026-47646 - Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Dynamics 365
description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Dynamics 365 Customer Voice allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-47646.

title: CVE-2026-15137 - A weakness has been identified in code-projects Interview Management System 1.0. This vulnerability
description: A weakness has been identified in code-projects Interview Management System 1.0. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file \inc\classes\View.php. This manipulation of the argument ID causes sql injection. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15137.

title: CVE-2026-15135 - A security flaw has been discovered in code-projects Online Food Order System 1.0. This affects an u
description: A security flaw has been discovered in code-projects Online Food Order System 1.0. This affects an unknown part of the file /edit_food_items.php. The manipulation of the argument update results in sql injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15135.

title: CVE-2026-15134 - A vulnerability was determined in CodeAstro Simple Online Leave Management System 1.0. Affected by t
description: A vulnerability was determined in CodeAstro Simple Online Leave Management System 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /SimpleOnlineLeave/index.php. Executing a manipulation of the argument email can lead to sql injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15134.
